rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §25.0822 governs patriotic society access to students and has no relation to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal.
quote: Sec. 25.0822. PATRIOTIC SOCIETY ACCESS TO STUDENTS.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
